title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI shows "Update All" button and individual component update options when headset, charge stand, and earbuds all have available firmware updates
steps: Tap on a connected headset (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) to open Device Settings
Tap on the Software Update tab
Observe the displayed firmware information and available buttons
expected: The Software Update tab displays the current firmware version, the latest available firmware version as a tappable link to release notes, and an Update button. For headsets with a charge stand or earbuds with a charge case, an "Update All" button is shown alongside individual update options per component. Components that do not support DFU via mobile show a note directing the user to update via the PC app.
